sources.label: DANDI / NWB calcium-imaging dataset
sources.intake_command: neurobench dataset intake --source-template dandi-nwb --dataset-id example_dandi_fish --raw-video Inputs/Public/example.nwb --frame-rate-hz 50 --pixel-size-microns 0.5 --out Outputs/Manifests/example_dandi_fish.dataset.json
sources.notes: Metadata-only scaffold. Download and NWB-to-frame-first conversion stay explicit local steps.

sources.label: Janelia/Figshare whole-brain light-sheet dataset
sources.intake_command: neurobench dataset intake --source-template janelia-figshare --dataset-id example_janelia_fish --raw-video Inputs/Public/example_converted.npy --frame-rate-hz 50 --pixel-size-microns 0.5 --out Outputs/Manifests/example_janelia_fish.dataset.json
sources.notes: Use after a local conversion writes a frame-first .npy or TIFF stack.
